---
title: "Replogle 2022 K562 essential Perturb-seq alignment QC"
author: "Izaskun Mallona"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
params:
  starsolo_base: "."
  cells_to_perturbation: "."
  indices_base: "."
  report_outdir: "."
  feature_sets: "genes genic_repeats intergenic_repeats"
  starsolo_modes: "unique multi"
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Matrix)
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(knitr)
})

starsolo_base <- params$starsolo_base
cells_path <- params$cells_to_perturbation
feature_sets <- strsplit(params$feature_sets, " ")[[1]]
starsolo_modes <- strsplit(params$starsolo_modes, " ")[[1]]

stopifnot(dir.exists(starsolo_base), file.exists(cells_path),
          length(feature_sets) >= 1, length(starsolo_modes) >= 1)
```

Short alignment QC for the Replogle 2022 K562 essential Perturb-seq run. Counts cells, detected genes, and detected repeats per library and per (mode, featureset). The downstream per-perturbation pseudobulk RUVg analysis lives in `paper/scripts/ruv_repogle_2022_perturbseq_report.Rmd`.

## Cells and perturbations in the analysis subset

```{r cells-summary}
cells <- read_tsv(cells_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
n_cells <- nrow(cells)
n_perturbations <- length(unique(cells$gene_transcript))
n_target_genes <- length(unique(cells$gene))
n_gemgroups <- length(unique(cells$gem_group))
cat("Cells in cells_to_perturbation.tsv:", n_cells, "\n")
cat("Distinct gene_transcript ids:    ", n_perturbations, "\n")
cat("Distinct target genes:           ", n_target_genes, "\n")
cat("Distinct gemgroups:              ", n_gemgroups, "\n")
```

## Per-library STARsolo summary

For each library and each (multimapper_mode, feature_set), counts cells with at least one UMI, total UMIs, and features with at least one UMI.

```{r per-lib-summary}
read_starsolo <- function(library_id, mode, fs) {
  mtx_dir <- file.path(starsolo_base, library_id,
                       paste0(mode, "_", fs), "Solo.out", "Gene", "raw")
  if (!dir.exists(mtx_dir)) return(NULL)
  m <- readMM(file.path(mtx_dir, "matrix.mtx"))
  barcodes <- readLines(file.path(mtx_dir, "barcodes.tsv"))
  list(matrix = m, barcodes = barcodes)
}

libraries <- sort(unique(paste0("KD6_", cells$gem_group, "_essential")))

per_lib_rows <- list()
for (lib in libraries) {
  for (mode in starsolo_modes) {
    for (fs in feature_sets) {
      r <- read_starsolo(lib, mode, fs)
      if (is.null(r)) next
      cells_with_umi <- sum(colSums(r$matrix) > 0)
      features_detected <- sum(rowSums(r$matrix) > 0)
      total_umi <- sum(r$matrix)
      per_lib_rows[[length(per_lib_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        library = lib, mode = mode, feature_set = fs,
        n_barcodes = length(r$barcodes),
        n_cells_with_umi = cells_with_umi,
        n_features_detected = features_detected,
        total_umi = total_umi,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }
  }
}
per_lib <- bind_rows(per_lib_rows)
kable(per_lib)
```

## Aggregated totals

Cells, genes, and repeat features detected across all libraries (union) per (mode, featureset).

```{r totals}
totals <- per_lib %>%
  group_by(mode, feature_set) %>%
  summarise(
    libraries = n(),
    total_barcodes = sum(n_barcodes),
    total_cells_with_umi = sum(n_cells_with_umi),
    total_umi = sum(total_umi),
    .groups = "drop")
kable(totals)
```

## Cells matched to the perturbation table

How many of the STARsolo barcodes per library appear in `cells_to_perturbation.tsv`. Mismatches indicate cells filtered out by the Phase 1 selection or barcode-format mismatches.

```{r cells-matched}
match_rows <- list()
for (lib in libraries) {
  gg <- as.integer(sub("^KD6_(\\d+)_essential$", "\\1", lib))
  expected_bc <- sub("-[0-9]+$", "", cells$cell_barcode[cells$gem_group == gg])
  for (mode in starsolo_modes) {
    fs <- feature_sets[1]
    r <- read_starsolo(lib, mode, fs)
    if (is.null(r)) next
    matched <- sum(expected_bc %in% r$barcodes)
    match_rows[[length(match_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      library = lib, mode = mode,
      n_expected = length(expected_bc),
      n_matched = matched,
      pct_matched = round(100 * matched / max(1, length(expected_bc)), 1),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }
}
matches <- bind_rows(match_rows)
kable(matches)
```

## Repeat feature totals

Distinct repeat features detected (union across libraries) per (mode, repeat featureset). Compares to gene featureset for context.

```{r repeat-totals}
union_rows <- list()
for (mode in starsolo_modes) {
  for (fs in feature_sets) {
    detected <- character(0)
    for (lib in libraries) {
      r <- read_starsolo(lib, mode, fs)
      if (is.null(r)) next
      mtx_dir <- file.path(starsolo_base, lib,
                            paste0(mode, "_", fs), "Solo.out", "Gene", "raw")
      features <- readLines(file.path(mtx_dir, "features.tsv"))
      features <- sapply(strsplit(features, "\t"), `[`, 1)
      detected <- union(detected,
                         features[rowSums(r$matrix) > 0])
    }
    union_rows[[length(union_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      mode = mode, feature_set = fs,
      n_features_union = length(detected),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }
}
unions <- bind_rows(union_rows)
kable(unions)
```
